sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['N', 'W', 'b', 'c', 'g', 'G']:
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        print(f"{n['color']}: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Check ascii around player and frames
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nRegion (rows 20-32, cols 34-56):")
for i in range(20, 32):
    print(f"{i:2d}: {ascii_lines[i][34:56]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
